section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 10 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 0.76%. the main contract I2305 closed 863.5, Most traders adopt separate quotations; and steel millswait- and-see sentiment increased. today's overall market transaction atmosphere is poor.
